name: whatsapp_send_template
description: Send a pre-approved WhatsApp template message with optional parameters for personalization. Templates must be approved by Meta before use.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Registered WhatsApp sender number in E.164 format.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Recipient WhatsApp phone number in E.164 format.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Template content with 'templateName' (string), 'templateData' (object with 'body' placeholders), and 'language' (string).

parameters.name: callbackData
parameters.description: Custom data to be included in delivery report webhooks.
